Off Calendar Mar-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AHMAD WAND's DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar per the moving party's request. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)

Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Continued To Mar-01-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admissions
Off Calendar Nov-23-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. RACHEL K. LOH, ESQ. of Dhillon Law Group Inc., Tel No. 415-433-1700 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. MARGEAUX M. PELUSI, ESQ. of Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP, Tel No. 925-222-3424 appearing for Defendants Chutney USA, Inc. and Mohammad Bajwa.

RULING - The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear. Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF AHMAD WAND'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admissions is denied. All requests for sanctions are denied. Defense counsel shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Atty. MARGEAUX M. PELUSI, ESQ. of Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP, Tel No. 925-222-3424 appearing for Defendants Chutney USA, Inc. and Mohammad Bajwa.

RULING - The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear. Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF AHMAD WAND'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories is denied. All requests for sanctions are denied. Defense counsel shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
